name: Start with 50 gold coins
short_description: This is an easy to use but difficult to pass game. It is suitable for players who like challenges and constantly break through themselves. You need to use your skills, strategies and resource management skills flexibly to survive and grow in this experience.
detailed_description: In this game, you will play a brave adventurer to exercise yourself in order to become a hero in the future. Each time you enter a level, you will be randomly transferred to one of the levels to face enemies and boss challenges of different difficulty. Only when you defeat the most difficult level boss can you really pass the level and complete the experience.
